creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
After upgrading gnome (and other ports) the problem is _STILL_ there but now 
manifests itself  a bit differently - this dialog box shows up after I 
unplug the USB ramstick (after umount -f).  New PR to be submitted.

I explicitly have "Never prompt or start programs on media insertion" 
selected in the 'System/Preferences/File Management' config box ('Media' tab)
